channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Laziness, 21st May
item.description:
Pull your finger out, lazy binmen.. Pull your finger out

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): High Street, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of building waste, 21st May
item.description:
More heavy bricks and masonry dumped by the bin on Rowhill Rd. This is an almost daily occurrence and becoming increasingly frustrating and upsetting. Can we please have some proper enforcement to prevent this from continuing.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Unwanted Plastic Containers Dumped on Pavement, 21st May
item.description:
Two large unwanted plastic containers have been left dumped on the pavement outside number 86. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Amount of Rubbish Dumped on Path, 21st May
item.description:
A large amount of rubbish has been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Fridge-Freeze r Dumped in Bin Store, 21st May
item.description:
An unwanted fridge-freezer has been left dumped in the communal bin store, preventing part of the store from being able to be used as a bin store. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ann Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 21st May
item.description:
Broken glass /frame

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hook Gate, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive tv box O/s67 Standard Road, 21st May
item.description:
A massive tv box has been dumped os 67 Standard Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Paddock Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all over the street, 21st May
item.description:
The whole street is covered in rubbish - can’t remember the last time it was cleaned. It’s piling up and blocking the pavement in places
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Boundary Lane, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins disrupting access, 21st May
item.description:
The entire street (Boundary Lane) is filled with bins for the houses and flats - at least 4 per house. It narrows the street to the point where access is sometimes not possible and you cannot walk down it, and clearly affects the ability of street cleaners to do their job. It must be impossible for anyone with a physical disability. The rubbish collectors will also often leave them in front of entrance ways. Please can an alternative to each house/ flat having separate and multiple bins be found, so that they don’t block access anymore. I know that other streets have large communal bins that everyone can take their rubbish out to and there are spaces in parts of the pavement on boundary lane where these could be put without causing issues. Please can a suitable location and means of securing the bins be found, so that they don’t block access.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Boundary Lane, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside churchward house, 21st May
item.description:
Bile of bin bags outside churchward house next to the food waste bin.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No 20 blocking pavement, 21st May
item.description:
No 20 keeps parking he’s vehicle on pavement blocking the walkway and cameras watching houses all down the road you can see in windows

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Vale, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shaftsbury (13-24) Entrance Door not Locking., 21st May
item.description:
This door seems not getting locked needs to be fixed asap to avoid any Tresspassing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-36, Denmark Hill, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass rubbish, 21st May
item.description:
There are alot of glass bottles on the slip road from the A2 leading up to the roundabout towards Bexley i have reported this to Dartford council but have been informed not their area .
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roadsign left after Hackney Half, 21st May
item.description:
This sign was out there for Hackney Half but no one has collected it, it's on the junction of Banbury Road and Southborough Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southborough Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: One way signs sprayed over, 21st May
item.description:
Both one way signs at the junction of Banbury Road and Southborough Road have been spray painted

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southborough Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 rubbish bags left in public space., 21st May
item.description:
Rubbish bags have been there for a couple of days. Rubbish has been left in this area in the recent past as well.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middleton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various mostly wood items outside 122 Grosvenor Terrace, 21st May
item.description:
Left on pavement. Need clearing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grosvenor Terrace, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 21st May
item.description:
Rubbish is constantly being dumped outside 21 Burney Street. The Estate Agent post has been left on the floor for over 6 weeks now. It is not related to any of the properties. The other big box has been there 2 days. Lots of rubbish has previously been dumped, but it was cleared away.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burney Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hackney rubbish collection trucks parked on lower Clapton road everyday., 21st May
item.description:
There has been an accumulation of rubbish collection vehicles from Hackney parked at the back of Clapton Pond, along Lower Clapton Road, at the end of the day. Several trucks are parked on the pavement and in violation of double yellow lines.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Clapton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous Overhanging Trees, 21st May
item.description:
Why has Bromley Council not pollarded the trees on Birkbeck Road. I twisted my back while trying to duck under the tree at 12 Birkbeck as anyone over 4 foot tall would need too. Poor service based on how much we pay in council tax.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
